Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'TotalizaCount' &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.Ativo retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPRODUTO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) &PossuiModuloAGRO_INSUMOS = RetornaEmpresaModulo.UDP(&Context.EmpCod, ModuloSistema.AGRO_INSUMOS) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Cell_Grid_DWC.Class = !'Invisible WCD_' + upper(Grid.InternalName) &Count.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &ProTipDef1 = nullvalue(&ProTipDef1) &ProStsRag1 = nullvalue(&ProStsRag1) &ProSolLot1 = nullvalue(&ProSolLot1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &ProTipDef2 = nullvalue(&ProTipDef2) &ProStsRag2 = nullvalue(&ProStsRag2) &ProSolLot2 = nullvalue(&ProSolLot2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &ProTipDef3 = nullvalue(&ProTipDef3) &ProStsRag3 = nullvalue(&ProStsRag3) &ProSolLot3 = nullvalue(&ProSolLot3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ACoesLoteData = new() &ACoesLoteDataItem = new() &ACoesLoteDataItem.Title = 'Marcar - Página atual' &ACoesLoteDataItem.EventKey = !'MarcarPagina' &ACoesLoteDataItem.IsDivider = False &ACoesLoteData.Add(&ACoesLoteDataItem) &ACoesLoteDataItem = new() &ACoesLoteDataItem.Title = 'Marcar - Todas páginas' &ACoesLoteDataItem.EventKey = !'MarcarTodas' &ACoesLoteDataItem.IsDivider = False &ACoesLoteData.Add(&ACoesLoteDataItem) &ACoesLoteDataItem = new() &ACoesLoteDataItem.Title = '----------------------------------' &ACoesLoteDataItem.EventKey = !'esp' &ACoesLoteDataItem.IsDivider = False &ACoesLoteData.Add(&ACoesLoteDataItem) &ACoesLoteDataItem = new() &ACoesLoteDataItem.Title = 'Alterar dados de produtos' &ACoesLoteDataItem.EventKey = !'AlterarDados' &ACoesLoteDataItem.IsDivider = False &ACoesLoteData.Add(&ACoesLoteDataItem) &ACoesLoteDataItem = new() &ACoesLoteDataItem.Title = 'Inativar produtos selecionados' &ACoesLoteDataItem.EventKey = !'InativarEmLote' &ACoesLoteDataItem.IsDivider = False &ACoesLoteData.Add(&ACoesLoteDataItem) &RelatoriosData = new() &RelatoriosDataItem = new() &RelatoriosDataItem.Title = 'Listagem de Produtos' &RelatoriosDataItem.FontIcon = !"BeforeIconClass BeforeIconClass fas fa-print FontIconTopRightActions" &RelatoriosDataItem.EventKey = !'ListagemProdutos' &RelatoriosDataItem.IsDivider = False &RelatoriosData.Add(&RelatoriosDataItem) &RelatoriosDataItem = new() &RelatoriosDataItem.Title = 'Etiquetas' &RelatoriosDataItem.FontIcon = !"BeforeIconClass BeforeIconClass fas fa-toilet-paper FontIconTopRightActions" &RelatoriosDataItem.EventKey = !'Etiquetas' &RelatoriosDataItem.IsDivider = False &RelatoriosData.Add(&RelatoriosDataItem) &ProSts = nullvalue(&ProSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Cadastro de Produtos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Ref.Cód.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Gra. Ref') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Descrição') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'NCM') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Ativo') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Marca') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Cód.Barras') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Grupo') &OrderedBy.AddItem(9, 'Tipo Custo') &OrderedBy.AddItem(10, 'Definição') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'WWProdutoColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'WWProdutoColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf ProRef.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible ProGraRef.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible ProNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible &ProEmbUnd.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible NcmCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible ProSts.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible MarNom.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible ProBar.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible GrupHie.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible ProTipCus.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible ProTipDef.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible &EstQtdVarchar.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible &ProGraEstLoc.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount ProRef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ProTipCus.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' ProTipDef.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &EstQtdVarchar.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon054_TrabalharGrades, &TrabalharGrades) EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &UpdateNovo.Link = Produtos.Link('WWPRODUTO', TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, ProCod, '') RetornaQuantidadeEstoque_wwProduto.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, ProCod, 1, &EstQtd,&EstLoc) &EstQtdVarchar = trim(toformattedString(&EstQtd)) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(&EstQtdVarchar, &EstQtdVarchar) &ProGraEstLoc = Trim(&EstLoc) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &UpdateNovo = !'' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" &DetailWebComponent = !'' &ActionsGrou.Clear() &ActionsGrou.AddItem(0, 'O que Fazer?') &ActionsGrou.AddItem(1, 'Alterar Preço Venda') If (ProIsGra <> true and &TrabalharGrades = 'S') &ActionsGrou.AddItem(2, 'Montar Grade') Endif If (ProIsGra = true and &TrabalharGrades = 'S') &ActionsGrou.AddItem(3, 'Editar Grades') Endif &ActionsGrou.AddItem(4, 'Imagens Produto') If (ProTipDef in (Definicao.FABRICADO, Definicao.SUBPRODUTO)) &ActionsGrou.AddItem(5, 'Receita do Produto') Endif If (ProTipDef <> Definicao.FABRICADO) &ActionsGrou.AddItem(6, 'Fornecedores Produto') Endif &ActionsGrou.AddItem(7, 'Clonar Produto') &ActionsGrou.AddItem(8, 'Locação do Produto') If (&PossuiModuloAGRO_INSUMOS = 'S' and ProStsRag = Status_SimNao.Sim) &ActionsGrou.AddItem(9, 'Diagnóstico Receita') Endif &ActionsGrou.AddItem(10, 'Consulta Estoque') &ActionsGrou.AddItem(11, 'Produtos Similar') If (ProSts = Status_Produto.INATIVO) &ActionsGrou.AddItem(12, 'Excluir Produto') Endif &ActionsGrou.AddItem(13, 'Log.Alteração') &ProEmbUnd = ProEmbUnd ProRef.ColumnClass = iif(ProSts <> Status_AtivoInativo.Ativo, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') ProTipCus.ColumnClass = iif(ProTipCus = TipoCusto.Receita, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell', !'WWColumn') Do Case Case ProTipDef = Definicao.REVENDA ProTipDef.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfoLight WWColumnTagInfoLightSingleCell' Case ProTipDef = Definicao.FABRICADO ProTipDef.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Otherwise ProTipDef.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn' EndCase &EstQtdVarchar.ColumnClass = iif(&EstQtd < 0, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ ProNom.Link = VerProduto.Link('WWPRODUTO', EmpCod, ProCod) ProRef.tooltipText = ProBarRef_Comp &Selecionado = false &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) For &SdtProdutosItem in &SdtProdutos If &SdtProdutosItem.ProCod = ProCod &Selecionado = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) exit//se achou sai do for do sdt Endif EndFor EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'WWProdutoColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ActionsGrou.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &ActionsGrou = 1 Do 'Do AlterarPreco' Case &ActionsGrou = 2 Do 'Do MontarGrade' Case &ActionsGrou = 3 Do 'Do EditarGrades' Case &ActionsGrou = 4 Do 'Do imgProduto' Case &ActionsGrou = 5 Do 'Do MateriaPrima' Case &ActionsGrou = 6 Do 'Do FornecedorProduto' Case &ActionsGrou = 7 Do 'Do ClonarProduto' Case &ActionsGrou = 8 Do 'Do locacaoProduto' Case &ActionsGrou = 9 Do 'Do Diagnostico' Case &ActionsGrou = 10 Do 'Do ConsultaEstoque' Case &ActionsGrou = 11 Do 'Do Similar' Case &ActionsGrou = 12 Do 'Do ExcluirProduto' Case &ActionsGrou = 13 Do 'Do LogAlteracao' EndCase &ActionsGrou = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Similar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WWProdutoSimilar.Create(EmpCod, ProRef, ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Similar_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event LogAlteracao_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wwLogRegistrosIndividual.Create(&LogErpRegKey, 'PRODUTO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsertNovo' Produtos.Link('WWPRODUTO', TrnMode.Insert, &Context.EmpCod, 0 , '') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_ACoesLote.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_ACoesLote.ActiveEventKey = !'MarcarPagina' Do 'Do MarcarPagina' Case ddo_ACoesLote.ActiveEventKey = !'MarcarTodas' Do 'Do MarcarTodas' Case ddo_ACoesLote.ActiveEventKey = !'esp' Do 'Do esp' Case ddo_ACoesLote.ActiveEventKey = !'AlterarDados' Do 'Do AlterarDados' Case ddo_ACoesLote.ActiveEventKey = !'InativarEmLote' Do 'Do InativarEmLote' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_Relatorios.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_Relatorios.ActiveEventKey = !'ListagemProdutos' Do 'Do ListagemProdutos' Case ddo_Relatorios.ActiveEventKey = !'Etiquetas' Do 'Do Etiquetas' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DetailWebComponent.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid_DWC.Object = wcDetalhamentoProduto.Create(EmpCod, ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProRef", '', !'Ref.Cód.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProGraRef", '', !'Gra. Ref', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProNom", '', !'Descrição', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&ProEmbUnd", '', !'UND', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"NcmCod", '', !'NCM', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProSts", '', !'Ativo', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"MarNom", '', !'Marca', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProBar", '', !'Cód.Barras', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"GrupHie", '', !'Grupo', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProTipCus", '', !'Tipo Custo', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"ProTipDef", '', !'Definição', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&EstQtdVarchar", '', !'Estoque', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&ProGraEstLoc", '', !'Locacao', False, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'WWProdutoColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProBar1.Visible = False &ProVarNcm1.Visible = False &MarCod1.Visible = False &MarNom1.Visible = False &ProSetCod1.Visible = False &ProSetNom1.Visible = False &GrupHie1.Visible = False &ProTipDef1.Visible = False &ProStsRag1.Visible = False &ProSolLot1.Visible = False &ProCatCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROVARNCM' &ProVarNcm1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETNOM' &ProSetNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'GRUPHIE' &GrupHie1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROTIPDEF' &ProTipDef1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSTSRAG' &ProStsRag1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSOLLOT' &ProSolLot1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROCATCOD' &ProCatCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProBar2.Visible = False &ProVarNcm2.Visible = False &MarCod2.Visible = False &MarNom2.Visible = False &ProSetCod2.Visible = False &ProSetNom2.Visible = False &GrupHie2.Visible = False &ProTipDef2.Visible = False &ProStsRag2.Visible = False &ProSolLot2.Visible = False &ProCatCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROVARNCM' &ProVarNcm2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSETNOM' &ProSetNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'GRUPHIE' &GrupHie2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROTIPDEF' &ProTipDef2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSTSRAG' &ProStsRag2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSOLLOT' &ProSolLot2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROCATCOD' &ProCatCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ProBar3.Visible = False &ProVarNcm3.Visible = False &MarCod3.Visible = False &MarNom3.Visible = False &ProSetCod3.Visible = False &ProSetNom3.Visible = False &GrupHie3.Visible = False &ProTipDef3.Visible = False &ProStsRag3.Visible = False &ProSolLot3.Visible = False &ProCatCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROVARNCM' &ProVarNcm3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSETNOM' &ProSetNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'GRUPHIE' &GrupHie3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROTIPDEF' &ProTipDef3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSTSRAG' &ProStsRag3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSOLLOT' &ProSolLot3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROCATCOD' &ProCatCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AlterarPreco' &AuxProCod = ProCod do 'chamatabela' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do MontarGrade' WpMontaGrade.Link(ProCod, 'WWPRODUTO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EditarGrades' wpEditaGrade.Link(EmpCod, ProCod, 'WWPRODUTO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do imgProduto' WWImagemProduto.Popup(ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do MateriaPrima' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPRODUTORECEITA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 2, &AutNiv) If &AutNiv >= 2 wpProdutoReceita.Popup('POPUP', EmpCod, ProCod) Else msg('Não Autorizado a Rotina [WWPRODUTORECEITA] Requerido Nível 2') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FornecedorProduto' wpfornecedorproduto.Call(ProCod, 'WWPRODUTO') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ClonarProduto' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPRODUTO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 2, &AddAutNiv) if &AddAutNiv >= 2 wpClonarProduto.Popup(EmpCod, ProCod) Refresh Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível 2, Adicionar/Alterar Produto. [WWPRODUTO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do locacaoProduto' LocacaoProduto.Popup(true, ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Diagnostico' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWDiagnostico.Call(ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ConsultaEstoque' wpConsultaEstoque.Link(ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Similar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Similar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExcluirProduto' retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPRODUTO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 3, &ExcluirAutNiv) if &ExcluirAutNiv >= 3 ExcluirProduto.Popup(EmpCod, ProCod, 1) Refresh Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível 3, Excluir Produto. [WWPRODUTO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LogAlteracao' &LogErpRegKey = trim(ProRef) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LogAlteracao_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do MarcarPagina' For Each line &AuxProCod = ProCod &AuxProRef = ProRef &AuxProNom = ProNom do 'addSDTSelecionados' EndFor Do 'TotalizaCount' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do MarcarTodas' For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod using DSWWProduto(&ProNom, &ProRef, &ProSts, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &ProBar1, &ProVarNcm1, &MarCod1, &MarNom1, &ProSetCod1, &ProSetNom1, &GrupHie1,&ProTipDef1,&ProStsRag1,&ProSolLot1, &ProCatCod1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &ProBar2, &ProVarNcm2, &MarCod2, &MarNom2, &ProSetCod2, &ProSetNom2, &GrupHie2,&ProTipDef2,&ProStsRag2,&ProSolLot2, &ProCatCod2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &ProBar3, &ProVarNcm3, &MarCod3, &MarNom3, &ProSetCod3, &ProSetNom3, &GrupHie3,&ProTipDef3,&ProStsRag3,&ProSolLot3, &ProCatCod3) &AuxProCod = ProCod &AuxProRef = ProRef &AuxProNom = ProNom do 'addSDTSelecionados' EndFor Do 'TotalizaCount' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do esp' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AlterarDados' if &SdtProdutos.Count > 0 &webSession.Set('PRODUTOTROCA', &SdtProdutos.ToXml()) wpAjustaGrupoConfirm.Popup() do 'limpaSelecionados' Refresh else msg('Atenção! Nenhum produto selecionado.') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do InativarEmLote' &webSession.Set('PRODUTOLOTEINATIVAR', &SdtProdutos.ToXml()) wpInativarEmLote.Popup(&Context.EmpCod) do 'limpaSelecionados' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ListagemProdutos' wpListagemProdutos.Popup() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Etiquetas' wpgeraEtiquetaProduto.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRONOM" &ProNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROREF" &ProRef.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTS" &ProSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' &ProBar1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROVARNCM' &ProVarNcm1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETCOD' &ProSetCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETNOM' &ProSetNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'GRUPHIE' &GrupHie1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROTIPDEF' &ProTipDef1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSTSRAG' &ProStsRag1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSOLLOT' &ProSolLot1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROCATCOD' &ProCatCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' &FiltroKey = 'FLT#WWProdutoColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase if &SalvarFiltro = true /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRONOM", "", not &ProNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProNom, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROREF", "", not &ProRef.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProRef, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTS", "", not &ProSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndiF EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROVARNCM' AND not &ProVarNcm1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProVarNcm1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETCOD' AND not &ProSetCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSETNOM' AND not &ProSetNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'GRUPHIE' AND not &GrupHie1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &GrupHie1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROTIPDEF' AND not &ProTipDef1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProTipDef1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSTSRAG' AND not &ProStsRag1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProStsRag1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROSOLLOT' AND not &ProSolLot1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSolLot1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROCATCOD' AND not &ProCatCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProCatCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROVARNCM' AND not &ProVarNcm2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProVarNcm2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSETCOD' AND not &ProSetCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSETNOM' AND not &ProSetNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'GRUPHIE' AND not &GrupHie2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &GrupHie2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROTIPDEF' AND not &ProTipDef2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProTipDef2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSTSRAG' AND not &ProStsRag2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProStsRag2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROSOLLOT' AND not &ProSolLot2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSolLot2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROCATCOD' AND not &ProCatCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProCatCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROBAR' AND not &ProBar3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProBar3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROVARNCM' AND not &ProVarNcm3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProVarNcm3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSETCOD' AND not &ProSetCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSETNOM' AND not &ProSetNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSetNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'GRUPHIE' AND not &GrupHie3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &GrupHie3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROTIPDEF' AND not &ProTipDef3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProTipDef3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSTSRAG' AND not &ProStsRag3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProStsRag3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROSOLLOT' AND not &ProSolLot3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProSolLot3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROCATCOD' AND not &ProCatCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProCatCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Produto" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &ProGraEstLoc.Click LocacaoProduto.Popup(true, ProCod) Refresh keep EndEvent Event &ActionSelecione.Click &AuxProCod = ProCod &AuxProRef = ProRef &AuxProNom = ProNom Do 'loadSDT' EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click do 'limpaSelecionados' EndEvent Sub 'addSDTSelecionados' &IsAchou = false For &SdtProdutosItem in &SdtProdutos If &SdtProdutosItem.ProCod = &AuxProCod &IsAchou = True Exit EndIF EndFor if &IsAchou = false &SdtProdutosItem = New() &SdtProdutosItem.ProCod = &AuxProCod &SdtProdutosItem.ProRef = &AuxProRef &SdtProdutosItem.ProNom = &AuxProNom &SdtProdutos.Add(&SdtProdutosItem) EndIf EndSub Sub 'limpaSelecionados' if &SdtProdutos.Count > 0 or &Count > 0 &SdtProdutos.Clear() &Count = 0 Do 'TotalizaCount' Refresh EndIf EndSub Sub 'loadSDT' if &Selecionado = false &SdtProdutosItem = New() &SdtProdutosItem.ProCod = &AuxProCod &SdtProdutosItem.ProRef = &AuxProRef &SdtProdutosItem.ProNom = &AuxProNom &SdtProdutos.Add(&SdtProdutosItem) else //esta true For &SdtProdutosItem in &SdtProdutos If &SdtProdutosItem.ProCod = &AuxProCod &Index = &SdtProdutos.IndexOf(&SdtProdutosItem) &SdtProdutos.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndIf Do 'TotalizaCount' Refresh EndSub Sub 'TotalizaCount' &Count.SetEmpty() &Count = &SdtProdutos.Count ProdutosSelecionados.Caption = format('(%1) selecionados', trim(str(&Count))) EndSub Sub 'chamaTabela' RetornaTabelaFilial.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &FilTabCod) For Each Order EmpCod, TabCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where TabCod = &FilTabCod wpadicionaprodutotabela.Popup('P', &AuxProCod, TabCod, TabUltAlt, false) Exit When None msg('Não existe tabela padrão na Filial!') EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
